title: post auth login success
description: Test successful user login with valid email and password, verify 200 response, httpOnly JWT cookie set, and subsequent GET /auth/session returns user, profile, company, and subscription data.

title: post auth register new user
description: Test user registration with fullName, email, password, and company data, verify 201 response, httpOnly JWT cookie set, and subsequent GET /auth/session returns created user and company.

title: get auth session with valid cookie
description: Test fetching tenant session with valid authentication cookie, expect 200 response with user, profile, company, subscription, and feature flags for dashboard rendering.

title: post finance pos sale with valid data
description: Test POS sale creation by posting valid lines, payments, customer, and branch data, expect 201 response with invoiceId, invoiceNumber, and status.

title: get inventory products with search query
description: Test product search by querying /inventory/products with search term and pagination, expect 200 response with product list matching query.

title: post inventory products with valid data
description: Test creating a new product with required fields name, price, and barcode, expect 201 response with created product details retrievable by ID.

title: get contacts customers with query
description: Test searching customers by query term, expect 200 response with matching customer list.

title: post finance sales with valid invoice data
description: Test creating a sales invoice with customerId, lines, discounts, and payments, expect 201 response with invoiceId, deterministic invoiceNumber, and status.

title: get reports daily with valid date range
description: Test fetching daily sales reports with valid from and to dates, expect 200 response with aggregated daily sales data for chart and table rendering.

title: post auth logout with valid session
description: Test user logout by posting to /auth/logout with valid cookie, expect 200 response with cleared httpOnly cookies and subsequent GET /auth/session returns 401 unauthorized.
